description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Release that runs on pull requests to the test branch. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, installs PyInstaller and requirements, builds a game with PyInstaller, configures and caches game data, copies and packs game files, and uploads the artifact. If a tag matching the version in package.json does not exist, create a new release and upload the artifact to it.
